task_completion.description: Open the 'TEM Filter Plug' sample image in Fiji.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji (ImageJ) application window is open, displaying an image titled 'TEM Filter Plug'.

task_completion.description: Compute the 2D Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) to generate a power spectrum.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new image window in Fiji titled 'FFT of TEM Filter Plug' showing a power spectrum (typically a dark background with a bright central star/spot and symmetrical bright spots/peaks).

task_completion.description: Measure the distance from the center of the FFT spectrum to the dominant spatial frequency peaks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line selection (usually yellow) drawn from the center bright spot to one of the outer bright peaks on the FFT image, and/or the Fiji 'Results' window open showing a measured 'Length' or 'Distance'.

task_completion.description: Save the FFT power spectrum image to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/fft_power_spectrum.tif (or .png).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, terminal, or Fiji 'Save As' dialog showing the file 'fft_power_spectrum.tif' or 'fft_power_spectrum.png' successfully saved in the '~/ImageJ_Data/results/' directory.

task_completion.description: Save a report to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/fft_periodicity_report.csv containing the calculated 'Dominant_Period' and 'Image_Width'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal output (e.g., cat command), or spreadsheet showing the contents of 'fft_periodicity_report.csv' in the correct directory, clearly displaying headers or values for 'Dominant_Period' (the calculated spacing) and 'Image_Width'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Fiji GUI to compute the FFT.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Fiji interface and its native FFT window should be visible in the screenshots, ensuring the agent didn't bypass the application by running a headless Python/OpenCV script to generate the FFT.

integrity.description: The agent actively measured the peak distance using Fiji's tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of the line tool being used on the FFT image or the Fiji 'Results' table showing measurement data, proving the agent didn't just guess or hardcode the expected period.

integrity.description: The CSV report contains genuine calculated values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains numeric values for 'Dominant_Period' and 'Image_Width' that correspond to the agent's measurements and the image properties, rather than placeholder text or an empty file.
